rulings.Case Title: ALLISON LESHEFSKY VS. RENKA PROP, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend Answer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANTS RENKA PROP, LLC, ANNE SWAIN'S Motion For Leave To Amend Answer To Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. Additionally, moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1324. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALLISON LESHEFSKY VS. RENKA PROP, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To Bring Permissive Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANTS RENKA PROP, LLC, ANNE SWAIN'S Motion For Leave To Bring Permissive Cross Complaint Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TONY FU VS. DEMAS YAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2021 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT TONY FU DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. The first cause of action is properly alleged to the extent it is alleged solely for the purposes of set off under Bankruptcy Code 553. Demurrer to causes of action arising out of fraudulent transfer is also overruled. Demurrer tests the sufficiency of the complaint. The statute of limitations defense is prematurely raised on the demurrer as it cannot be ascertained based in the allegations of the complaint alone. Statute of Limitations under the circumstances shall be addressed on dispositive motions or at trial. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER WIENS ET AL VS. CHRISTOPHER COOKE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Conduct Financial Discovery On Defendants Cooke And Anastassiou
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2021 line 3. PLAINTIFFS JENNIFER WIENS, BRIAN MATHY'S Motion For Leave To Conduct Financial Discovery On Defendants Cooke And Anastassiou is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to Defendant Cooke. All responses to remain confidential: attorney and expert eyes only. Motion is DENIED without prejudice as to Defendant Anastassioua. Plaintiff fails to meet the requirements of CC 3295(c). =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SAN PABLO SR2, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL VS. SPARX7, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANT SPARX 7, LLC DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT Complaint is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of contract is sustained with leave to amend to allege enforceable contracts between the parties; the breached terms of each contract; and breach of those terms by each defendant. Demurrer to the causes of action for fraud and negligent misrepresentations is overruled. These causes of action are sufficiently alleged. Demurrer to the cause of action for declaratory relief is overruled; it is not duplicative of the cause of action for breach of contract. Demurrer to the cause of action for accounting is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts showing that ordinary legal action demanding a fixed sum is impracticable. Demurrer to the cause of action for injunction is sustained with leave to amend to allege injunction as a remedy for a wrong that cannot be compensated by money damages. Complaint is currently seeking repayment of the amounts already taken from the Soft-Costs Account. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SAN PABLO SR2, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL VS. SPARX7, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANT SPARX 7, LLC'S Motion To Strike is GRANTED with leave to amend as to the allegations on the fraud and negligent misrepresentation cause of action not drawn in conformity with the law, i.e. without requisite specificity as to who, how, when, to whom, etc., the misrepresentations were made. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LEGAL RECOVERY SERVICES VS. CRYSTAL LEI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2021 line 5. DEFENDANTS BRYANT FU, TING POON, CRYSTAL LEI'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the first and the second causes of action for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) establishing the underlying fraud supporting these causes of action. Demurrer to the first cause of action is overruled. Request for Declaratory relief is sufficiently stated. Moving party failed to state any authority for the proposition that it is barred by the statute of limitations and improperly raised a multitude of factual issues, that can not be addressed on a demurrer. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. SHICKOLA RICKS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2021 line 7. Motion For Leave To Amend is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall file and serve First Amended Complaint forthwith. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OSLA O. YOUNG ET AL VS. ROBIN KINCADE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2021 line 6. DEFENDANT ROBIN KINCADE, SUSAN KINCADE DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is transferred to department 210 to be heard by the honorable Vedica Puri on January 25, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. = (501/CFH)
